## Summary

Describe the user-visible change and why it is needed.

## Validation

- [ ] `python3 -m unittest discover tests -v`
- [ ] `python3 preview.py --demo`
- [ ] `python3 build.py`
- [ ] Windows/NVDA testing completed when the change affects NVDA integration
- [ ] Documentation and `CHANGELOG.md` updated when needed
- [ ] AI assistance, if any, has been disclosed and reviewed

## Accessibility and terminology

Describe any change to Greek wording, gestures, focus, speech, braille, or
application behavior. Link a source or explain the teaching/user convention for
terminology changes.
